name: Databricks
description: External Databricks plugin with conservative read-only SQL execution.

host.label: Databricks Host
host.help: Workspace host URL. Must be HTTPS and an allowed Databricks domain.

token.label: Databricks Token
token.help: Databricks PAT used by SQL Statements API.

timeoutMs.label: HTTP Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Per-request timeout for SQL submit/poll requests.

retryCount.label: Retry Count
retryCount.help: Maximum retry attempts for transient submit/poll failures.

pollingIntervalMs.label: Polling Interval (ms)
pollingIntervalMs.help: Polling interval while statement is pending/running/queued.

maxPollingWaitMs.label: Max Polling Wait (ms)
maxPollingWaitMs.help: Maximum wait budget for polling before timeout.

allowedCatalogs.label: Allowed Catalogs
allowedCatalogs.help: Optional allowlist. If set, all resolved targets must include and match catalog.

allowedSchemas.label: Allowed Schemas
allowedSchemas.help: Optional allowlist. If set, all resolved targets must include and match schema.

readOnly.label: Read-Only Mode
readOnly.help: Must stay true. Mutating SQL operations are blocked.

token.description: Databricks access token (supports secret input resolution).

pollingIntervalMs.description: Polling interval while statement is not terminal.

maxPollingWaitMs.description: Maximum total wait time for polling.
